creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mg from comment #5)
> shouldn't this find a place in UPDATING ?

Without understanding why does it happen? I can't reproduce. Users with local patches (e.g. from bugzilla) already know how to recover on updates as anything that hasn't landed to the main tree is technically "not supported" (yet).

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2017-April/108172.html
